inputs.row: {"incident":"scanner outage","impact":"three delayed outbound shipments","action":"rerouted urgent orders and opened maintenance ticket"}
inputs.text: A regional warehouse delayed three outbound shipments after a scanner outage. Operations rerouted urgent orders, restored scanning after two hours, and opened a follow-up ticket for device maintenance.

backend.description: In-context tabular foundation predictor (support set + query rows).
backend.name: predict_tabular_foundation

capability_manifest.description: TabPFN-shaped in-context tabular prediction for labeled support rows and query rows. The current sidecar handler is a deterministic CPU reference implementation with the same SQL/request contract expected by a true TabPFN GPU forward pass, so the package can prove the operator shape before the heavier model runtime is swapped in.
capability_manifest.name: tabpfn_foundation

operators.description: Predict a target for query rows in-context from a labeled support set. Input is a single jsonb bundle {task, target, support, queries}; output is {predictions:[...]} aligned to queries. Invoked by rvbbit.predict_tabular.
operators.name: predict_tabular_foundation

capability_manifest.title: TabPFN-style In-Context Tabular Predictor

tests.description: Predict query rows from a labeled support set and assert the in-context JSON shape.
tests.name: tabpfn_bundle_contract

catalog_entry.description: TabPFN-shaped support/query tabular prediction for data science workflows.
catalog_entry.name: tabpfn_foundation
catalog_entry.title: TabPFN-style In-Context Tabular Predictor
